query:
SELECT pa.id, pa.name, pa.imageUrl, p.name as projectName 
FROM project_amenities pa 
JOIN projects p ON pa.projectId = p.id 
WHERE p.slug = 'pride-purple-park-eden';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3wsSeNnMFw5dboG.2c4b3d36d2f1 --database aSHZEBwUmWTuA7HAwuTg3z --execute SELECT pa.id, pa.name, pa.imageUrl, p.name as projectName 
FROM project_amenities pa 
JOIN projects p ON pa.projectId = p.id 
WHERE p.slug = 'pride-purple-park-eden';
